title: Hover security probe seed
description: A Hover access-control / vulnerability probe seed. Lives under <project>/.hover/rules/security/. Matches the SecuritySeed shape consumed by @hover-dev/probe-engine. See docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-14-security-direction-design.md.

category.description: authz = business/access-control (orange security mode); vuln = attack/exploit (red pentest mode). Defaults to authz.

note.description: Optional human note about what this seed is for.

match.description: Cheap relevance filter against a captured flow — never an exact match.

method.description: HTTP methods this seed applies to (e.g. ["GET"]). Omit to match any.

urlParam.description: Regex tested against the request URL (e.g. "/orders/\\d+").

bodyField.description: Regex tested against the request body text (e.g. "\"role\"").

needsAuth.description: Only match flows that carry an auth credential (cookie / authorization / x-api-key).

probe.description: How to probe a matching flow and what a real finding looks like.

strategy.description: How to mutate + replay (e.g. "swap the numeric id for another user's id and replay").

signal.description: What a real finding looks like (e.g. "200 OK returning the other user's record").

secondIdentity.description: Needs a second identity (storageState) to be meaningful — cross-identity IDOR/BOLA.

destructive.description: Issues a state-changing request (DELETE / mass-assign). Gated off unless allowDestructive.

assert.description: Optional Playwright request-fixture assertion to emit into a crystallized .security.spec.ts.
